feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Again
entry.summary:
Author: Igni_hendricks

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 107,286Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 460

Summary: When Merlin kills Morgana, she thinks it’s finally over. But then she wakes up several years in the past, in the heart of Camelot, surrounded by the very people she wants dead.She needs a plan, and she needs answers. Neither of these things turn out to be as simple as they seem, and Morgana begins to wonder if there could have been a different path for her after all.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: My_Sweet_Prince

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,083Chapters: 5/15Kudos: 33

Summary: **This story has been completely rewritten, so if you have read it before, please consider re-reading it** Once again, Arthur has to go on a journey to save Merlin's life, but this time it feels like more is at stake

entry.title: Walk of Shame
entry.summary:
Author: VeloxVoid

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,316Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 126

Summary: Arthur walks back through the streets of Camelot at daybreak, ruffled and dishevelled. To the citizens who sneak glances and whisper, the reason for his walk is a mystery. But to Arthur, mind still reeling after his first night with Merlin, it's his walk of shame. - Arthur and Merlin both fall deeper into a romance that they know can never be. One night's walk of shame turns into many.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Between Magic and Mind
entry.summary:
Author: painting_carnations

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,771Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 14

Summary: "He needed his magic to be stronger, needed more control over it as well. A whole lifetime plus ten years of guided practice, you would think he would be better. But he still made mistakes. Mistakes that can't happen. Merlin would figure something out." or Where Merlin takes a potion to strengthen his control over his own magic, only it works a little too well. He gains a few odd skills he didn't have before, including the ability to hear the minds of those around him, magic or not. No one's thoughts surprise him so much as the King's. Or his Uncle's.

entry.title: the ghost come back
entry.summary:
Author: indigotigress7

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 525Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 6

Summary: Twenty-first-century Merlin, tired of waiting for Arthur to return, travels back in time determined to make the best of a second chance in Camelot.(Gaius, still reeling from watching his nephew drink from a poisoned chalice and nearly perish from its effects, is almost too relieved that Merlin has woken up at all to notice how strangely he’s behaving.)(Almost.)

entry.title: *Pages through your secret diary* OwO what's this?
entry.summary:
Author: SH_After_Vesper

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,244Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 30

Summary: --- “Did you intend for me to find these?” Arthur asked, opening his hand and flattening the parchment on the table. Merlin’s stomach dropped. He lunged to stand, but Arthur was faster, a firm hand pressing down on the back of his neck. Arthur leaned in, lips hairs away from his ears, "Do you want me to do these things to you, Merlin?" In a last-ditch attempt at saving his dignity, Merlin shook his head no, and was about to say as much when Arthur's hand squeezed, "Don't", he growled, "lie to me". "I'm sorry," Merlin exhaled, but Arthur's grip did not relent, as that wasn't answering his question. "Yes." --- During a rutine search of the castle for magical objects, Arthur finds a particular stash of pages that Merlin had tried to keep hidden. But it isn't about magic. No. It's about something far worse. --- Written for Merthur Microfic, prompt: Pages

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merthur Microfic
  • Exhibitionism
  • Secret Diary
  • ok so basically merlin writes explicit self insert fanfiction with Arthur and gets found out
  • turns out arthur's into it and matched merlin's freak

entry.title: Carpenter
entry.summary:
Author: PrincessMariaPhiliper

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,415Chapters: 19/24Kudos: 287

Summary: Arthur gives Merlin a knife,Merlin takes up carpentry.The fates recast the dice,Camelot becomes anarchy. 𖥸 “Girl.” He near enough whispered taking the back of Merlin’s wrist into his palm and drawing it up to meet his face. He inhaled, still with no exact location of the smell. Moving up Merlin’s arm across his face as the other looked on dumbly.Reaching the pit of his elbow Arthur stilled, there is was, the fragrance laid upon Merlin’s inner forearm.He pulled it gently closer, wanting a deeper inhale before confirming and reporting back to the other. He was indeed correct. The trouble was Arthur had regrettably misjudged the space between his own face and Merlin’s skin. Causing his slightly parted lips to brush ever so gently across Merlin’s forearm. Sending a jolt through both men at the feeling. Neither acknowledged the graze but they were effected by it nonetheless. Arthur’s heart rate sped as Merlin’s stopped completely. Four sets of blue eyes widened. They were both too stubborn to speak. Meaning they sat in purgatory for quite some time, feeling neither comfortable nor uncomfortable. Something strange shifting inside of them as the sun began to set over Camelot.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: she who walks between shapes
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,252Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin didn’t go far.He stopped just outside the door.Refused to leave.Arthur didn’t push him.He slid down the wall instead, sitting on the cold stone floor, arms resting loosely on his knees.Merlin stayed standing.Watching the door.Waiting.

entry.title: There Were Dragons Here Once: Seven
entry.summary:
Author: Saxifactumterritum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,244Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Merlin has found Will, now he and Elyan and Will can find Balinor and that will conclude his quest, surely? But it's cold and wintry and they can't really find their way, and Elyan is odd and wary, and Merlin is tired. And, there might be something coming. This is part of the series I call the adventuring au where Merlin is a Physician-ish... or really by now a physician. Possibly. There are dragons :)

entry.title: Amber and Wild Thyme
entry.summary:
Author: Ginkgo_Biloba_Baggins

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,303Chapters: 12/33Kudos: 352

Summary: When Hunith arrives in Camelot with news of an attack, Merlin knows what he has to do. He is perfectly capable of driving away the likes of Kanen’s men by himself; he has been defending Ealdor since he was ten years old. However, he has no idea of the lengths Arthur will go to to protect his poor, misguided manservant - such as adopting a disguise and following him home. A Canon Era AU of S1 E10 The Moment of Truth

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 87,360Chapters: 58/?Kudos: 30

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,180Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 182

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is a SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Shared Assets
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,500Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 63

Summary: Merlin and Arthur had always been like some old married couple, or so everyone said. But this was going a tad too far. What the hell did Merlin mean he had just as much a right to their shared assets as Arthur did? Since when did they share anything!Or the 5 things that Arthur is forced to “share” with Merlin, and the one thing he keeps all to himself. Just kidding, the 5 times Merlin steals Arthur’s shit and the one thing he can’t steal.

entry.title: Shared Affections
entry.summary:
Author: Hades_Lord_of_the_Dead

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,758Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 69

Summary: King Arthur brings magic back to Camelot and the Triple Goddess revives Sir Lancelot as a reward. Lancelot’s return sparks old feelings for Gwen and Arthur wonders if relationships might not be as rigid as he was raised to believe...In other words, Gwen and Arthur try polyamory, prompting Arthur into a journey of self-discovery. Gwen/Arthur; Gwen/Lancelot; Eventual Arthur/MerlinNo smut I'm afraid (but keep an eye out for the sequel...)

entry.title: The Heart of the Kingdom
entry.summary:
Author: juliairian

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,193Chapters: 16/37Kudos: 84

Summary: "Camelot had to be different to suddenly accommodate such a person as Merlin. He could never have existed in Camelot before, and therefore, Camelot changed. There had to be shadows and secrets to keep Merlin safe, mysteries to bring them together, and silences for all the words they never said to each other." Merlin saves one man from Uther's pyre and never becomes Arthur's servant - instead, the two unlikely friends must defend Camelot and over time learn the truth about magic and what happened before the Purge. Will magic in Camelot gain two powerful protectors despite the world trying to keep them apart?

  • Manipulative Uther
  • Coming of Age
  • Arthur learns the truth about magic
  • Different Backstories
  • Different parentage (Morgana)
  • Inspired by History and Arthurian Canon
  • Pre-Relationship
  • Falling In Love
  • Mutual Pining
  • Emrys Reborn
  • POV Multiple
  • Scooby Gang-esque little missions for our heroes
  • I say slow but Merlin falls for Arthur almost instantly

entry.title: Wise man says, only fool rush in
entry.summary:
Author: gloriask

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,548Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 136

Summary: “You must have it the worst,” Daegal added, eyeing him with newfound sympathy. “You’re with him all the time.” Merlin made a small, noncommittal sound. “I mean, the hours alone,” Daegal continued. “And the pressure. And the—everything. You’re basically on call 24/7, right?” “Something like that,” Merlin’s shoulders shook slightly.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Daegal (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Leon (Merlin)
  • George (Merlin)
  • Alternate Universe - Modern Setting
  • POV Outsider
  • Established Relationship
  • Secret Relationship
  • Boss/Employee Relationship
  • CEO Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Fluff

entry.title: The Squires of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,800Chapters: 168/?Kudos: 143

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, destiny rests on the shoulders of five young boys, along with a lot of grueling work, dedication, and long hours of cleaning up after the new knights. They are the Squires of Camelot.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Gwaine/Percival (Merlin)
